# CWE-256 positive: writes password field without hashing (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-256-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-256 Plaintext Storage of a Password
// Vulnerable line: persists password column as provided.
func CreateCredential(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	login := r.FormValue("login")
	pass := r.FormValue("pass")
	_, err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO credentials(login, pass) VALUES(?, ?)", login, pass)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "save", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"login": login})
}
